{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Elysia gates
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The gates of [[Elysia]] feature a silver-set [[emerald]] the size of [[Rhalia]]'s head.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
